title: Review config module and YAML file
description: Review the config module (config.py), default config.yaml, pyproject.toml changes, and unit tests. Verify: (1) all default values exactly match the current hardcoded constants across runner.py, cli.py, skills.py, scheduler.py, and prompts.py — any mismatch would cause regressions when Phase 2 wires the config in, (2) dataclasses are truly frozen, (3) load_config fallback logic is correct, (4) allowed_tools_for merge/dedup is correct, (5) YAML structure matches the dataclass models, (6) test coverage is sufficient, (7) no breaking changes to existing imports or behavior.
acceptance_criteria: All default values in config.py and config.yaml match current hardcoded constants exactly
Frozen dataclass constraint is properly enforced
load_config fallback and error handling are correct
allowed_tools_for merge logic produces correct results
No breaking changes introduced to existing modules
verdict: approved or needs_changes with actionable feedback
